assertionResults.reason: The Mayor research log exists but contains only initialization text and no per-iteration Phase 0 budget-check entries, so the required budget-check-before-dispatch behavior is not evidenced.
No proposed-batch artifacts were found in the scbench beads data, so low-budget batch-size reduction behavior and rationale could not be validated.
Only static role beads were found for Review Board and Idea Factory; no Phase 1 dispatch/wait-for-completion entries were present to validate synchronized dispatch behavior.
No batch bead body artifacts were present, so required fields (rationale, configs, expected outcomes, budget estimate) could not be checked.

Mechanical Red Team gating is not evidenced for a batch bead: the Red Team review bead sc-d6f has no dependencies/dependents, current ready output shows no blocked batch transition, and the only dependency in the database is unrelated (sc-yfn -> sc-wisp-w45q).
The Red Team review artifact sc-d6f contains only a short test description with no numbered objections and no comments; no Mayor objection-response pairs are present.

frictions.description: Running bd commands from /home/ubuntu/gt initially targeted the hq workspace rather than the assigned scbench rig database.
frictions.resolution: Switched shell context to /home/ubuntu/gt/scbench for all assertion checks.

frictions.description: bd dep list did not expose any historical closed gating links, so direct SQL inspection of the dependencies table was required to confirm existing dependency records.
frictions.resolution: Used read-only bd sql queries and captured dependency-table output as evidence.

blockers.description: No Phase 0-2.5 loop execution artifacts (batch beads, dispatch records, or wait-for-completion notes) were present in the scbench beads dataset.
blockers.quickFixAttempted: Searched by notes text and keywords (Phase 0, budget check, proposed batch, batch, review board, idea factory) and listed all issues with --all --include-infra --include-gates --include-templates; no matching loop artifacts were found.

summary: Validated 6 loop-phase assertions via shell/gt/bd checks. VAL-LOOP-001, VAL-LOOP-005, and VAL-LOOP-006 failed due to missing required loop/gating/objection-response behavior, and VAL-LOOP-002/003/004 are blocked because no corresponding phase artifacts were present to evaluate.
